title: Immigration & Compliance | Law Firm | Capabilities | Greenberg Traurig LLP
content:
### Powering Global Talent. Protecting Business. Advancing Growth.
In a fast-changing regulatory environment, immigration is a business priority. Global mobility shapes how organizations build teams, enter markets, and manage risk across borders. Greenberg Traurig’s Immigration & Compliance team advises businesses, organizations, investors, and individuals on immigration strategy, compliance, and workforce planning matters affecting today’s global workforce.
With more than 150 immigration professionals worldwide, we deliver strategic, technology-enabled, and policy-informed guidance aligned to business priorities across industries and geographies, supported by automation, analytics, and secure case management. The Immigration & Compliance team is an award-winning, widely recognized group, cited by leading legal and industry publications for its experience and leadership in helping organizations, investors, and individuals navigate business immigration, compliance, and investment-related matters. We collaborate across employment, corporate, real estate, and litigation practices and provide a white-glove service model for executives, founders, investors, and other mission-critical personnel, including consular strategy and complex adjudications that can affect global operations.

### Global Immigration & Workforce Mobility
- Provide end-to-end guidance on global mobility and immigration strategies, including nonimmigrant work authorization, permanent residence, consular processing, and investment-related pathways, with options such as H-1B, L-1, O-1, E-2, EB-1, EB-2, EB-3, EB-5, and related classifications
- Provide white-glove support for executives, founders, and mission-critical personnel in sensitive and time-critical matters
- Manage consular strategy and complex adjudications, including travel and entry considerations
- Support cross-border mobility, international assignments, and global workforce planning
- Coordinate business and visitor visa support and counsel across jurisdictions through established global relationships

### Compliance, Enforcement & Risk Management
- Design and implement Form I-9, E-Verify, and Labor Condition Application compliance programs
- Conduct internal audits, remediation, and process improvement to strengthen ongoing compliance
- Represent clients in matters involving the Department of Labor (DOL), U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), and other federal immigration and compliance authorities, including investigations and enforcement actions
- Provide guidance on regulatory risk mitigation, evolving enforcement trends, and compliance controls
- Advise on export controls, licensing requirements, and related employment considerations

### Immigration Policy Development & Training
- Develop multi-year immigration and compliance strategies aligned with workforce and business objectives
- Monitor regulatory developments and provide practical policy analysis for business planning
- Deliver management and employee training on compliance obligations and evolving requirements
- Support administrative advocacy and legislative strategy involving the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), the Department of State (DOS), and other federal agencies and policymakers

### Corporate Transactions and Workforce Integration
- Advise on immigration strategy for mergers, acquisitions, spinoffs, and reorganizations
- Perform immigration due diligence, risk assessment, and mitigation planning
- Support workforce continuity planning, including work authorization updates and required filings
- Align immigration planning with corporate, employment, and tax considerations across transactions

### Tax-Efficient Workforce Structuring
- Structure compensation and mobility programs to leverage tax treaties and available benefits
- Advise on global equity and share plans, including tax, payroll, privacy, and employment considerations
- Coordinate with tax and employment teams on cross-border workforce matters

### EB-5 Immigration & Investment
For more than two decades, Greenberg Traurig has served as a trusted advisor to stakeholders across the EB-5 ecosystem, guiding matters from program structuring and regulatory compliance through investor representation and project execution.
We advise Regional Centers, developers, investors, migration agents, private equity funds, financial institutions, and project sponsors on EB-5 matters involving real estate, infrastructure, hospitality, health care, and other capital-intensive industries. Greenberg Traurig has structured and supported some of the largest and most complex EB-5 offerings in the history of the program, advising on transactions involving billions of dollars in EB-5 investment.
Our EB-5 work reflects the same integrated approach that defines the broader Immigration & Compliance platform, drawing on immigration, corporate, real estate, regulatory compliance, tax, and litigation capabilities to address the legal and commercial realities of today’s EB-5 market.
Greenberg Traurig’s Immigration & Compliance team is actively engaged in monitoring and analyzing immigration, regulatory, and policy developments affecting employers, investors, and the global workforce.
Immigration Insights Video Podcast
Immigration Insights is Greenberg Traurig’s video podcast series focused on immigration law, policy, and workforce mobility. Through video discussions with Immigration & Compliance lawyers and guest speakers, the series explores compliance trends, enforcement priorities, adjudication developments, and the practical business impact of legislative and policy changes.
Inside Business Immigration Blog
Inside Business Immigration is the Practice’s blog providing analysis and practical insights on visa trends, compliance requirements, and enforcement developments affecting employers. Topics include H-1B, PERM, labor condition applications, Form I-9 and E-Verify compliance, workplace identity issues, and agency guidance. The blog regularly examines legislation, regulations, executive actions, and case law relevant to business immigration.
EB-5 Insights is the Practice’s blog dedicated to the immigration, tax, and regulatory issues shaping the EB-5 program. The blog provides analysis of program developments, compliance considerations, and strategic issues relevant to Regional Centers, developers, investors, and other EB-5 stakeholders.
To learn more about our Immigration & Compliance capabilities, please feel free to reach out to our Immigration & Compliance Practice contacts .
